'''鈭歱-n-n-m''' ('''kapannemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pull|pull]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pull|pull]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-n-n-m
|-
! Lemma
| kapannemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipanemoko|thipanemoko]] || [[word:jipanemoko|jipanemoko]] || [[word:shipanemoko|shipanemoko]] || [[word:kipanemoko|kipanemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
